title: BenchmarkCaseInput
description: Schema for a single benchmark case input file (input.json).

case_id.description: Unique identifier for this benchmark case, e.g. 'case_01_template'.

data_source.description: Origin of the data. 'mimic_iv' requires PhysioNet credentialing.

patient_transcript.description: Raw doctor-patient dialogue, verbatim or lightly de-identified.

chart_notes.description: Raw clinical notes as entered by the clinician; may be noisy or incomplete.

medication_list.description: Human-entered medication names, not yet normalized. May include brand/generic variants and typos.

difficulty.description: Estimated clinical complexity of the case.
